propertiesClass.name: ownedBrandSnippet
ownedBrandStyle

components.templateData:
Figma sourced · Stencil core · Angular wrapper

Angular showcase

{{ activeBrand().label }}

Angular consumes the same runtime, registry handoff, and token contract.

This app consumes a compiled Angular wrapper library on top of the Stencil web component package, while the visual identity arrives at app level from the token contract, the shipped Figma preset, and optional brand override libraries.

Launch selected brand Switch to external override

Launch status

{{ launch.label }} launched in {{ titleFromKey(launch.theme) }} mode. Captured through the Angular wrapper at {{ launch.launchedAt }}. Latest queued target: {{ launch.brand }}. pnpm registry:add owned-brand-pack ./src/owned/brands/{{ launch.brand }} No launch captured yet. Click the primary CTA to prove the wrapper is interactive and to generate the next ownership command. pnpm registry:add owned-brand-pack ./src/owned/brands/registry-owned
Typeface {{ activeBrand().fontFamily.replaceAll('"', '').split(',')[0] }}
Source {{ activeBrand().sourceLabel }}
Latest launch count {{ launches().length }}
{{ entry[0] }}

Registry ownership

Copy the component source or a brand pack into your own Angular codebase.

The local registry works like a shadcn-style handoff. Teams can keep consuming the published package, or copy the component source and a brand starter into their app and take responsibility for local edits there.

import { FfButton } from '@fuggetlenfe/angular-wrapper' @import '@fuggetlenfe/tokens/contract.css' @import '@fuggetlenfe/tokens/figma-preset.css' @import '@fuggetlenfe/brand-styles/demo.css'
pnpm registry:list pnpm registry:add ff-button-source ./src/owned/components/ff-button pnpm registry:add owned-brand-pack ./src/owned/brands/registry-owned
registry/index.json registry/items/ff-button-source.json registry/items/owned-brand-pack.json examples/registry-installed/ff-button-source examples/registry-installed/owned-brand-pack

This repo already contains an installed sample pack under examples/registry-installed/owned-brand-pack, and the selector above can switch to Registry Owned immediately.

Consumer token lab

Edit the owned brand live without touching the upstream Stencil package.

Registry Owned preview

{{ ownedPreset() === 'custom' ? 'Custom tuning' : titleFromKey(ownedPreset()) }}
{{ stateLabel(state) }} Registry Owned 
{{ ownedBrandSnippet() }}

State matrix

Angular renders the shipped presets and consumer-owned brands from one runtime.

{{ brandCatalog[item].label }}

{{ brandCatalog[item].fontFamily.replaceAll('"', '').split(',')[0] }}

{{ stateLabel(state) }} {{ brandCatalog[item].label }}

Palette output

Every palette family remains available from the shared Figma token package.

{{ titleFromKey(paletteName) }} {{ paletteName.startsWith('brand') ? 'Brand identity' : 'Shared semantic scale' }}
{{ entry[0] }}

Synced from Figma file {{ tokens.meta.source.figmaFileKey }} at {{ tokens.meta.source.syncedAt | date:'medium' }}.

Current surface: {{ titleFromKey(theme()) }} mode with {{ activeBrand().label }} from {{ activeBrand().sourceLabel }}.

variables.name: brandCatalog
variables.defaultValue:
{
  'brand-1': {
    ...tokens.brands['brand-1'],
    palette: tokens.palettes['brand-1'],
    sourceLabel: 'Figma preset',
    accent: tokens.palettes['brand-1']['50'],
    accentSoft: tokens.palettes['brand-1']['10'],
    accentDeep: tokens.palettes['brand-1']['100']
  },
  'brand-2': {
    ...tokens.brands['brand-2'],
    palette: tokens.palettes['brand-2'],
    sourceLabel: 'Figma preset',
    accent: tokens.palettes['brand-2']['50'],
    accentSoft: tokens.palettes['brand-2']['10'],
    accentDeep: tokens.palettes['brand-2']['100']
  },
  'brand-3': {
    ...tokens.brands['brand-3'],
    palette: tokens.palettes['brand-3'],
    sourceLabel: 'Figma preset',
    accent: tokens.palettes['brand-3']['50'],
    accentSoft: tokens.palettes['brand-3']['10'],
    accentDeep: tokens.palettes['brand-3']['100']
  },
  'client-acme': {
    label: 'Client Acme',
    fontFamily: '"Space Grotesk", Inter, Arial, sans-serif',
    palette: externalBrandPalette,
    sourceLabel: 'External CSS override',
    accent: externalBrandPalette['50'],
    accentSoft: externalBrandPalette['10'],
    accentDeep: externalBrandPalette['100']
  },
  'registry-owned': {
    label: 'Registry Owned',
    fontFamily: '"Sora", Inter, Arial, sans-serif',
    palette: registryOwnedPalette,
    sourceLabel: 'Registry installed override',
    accent: registryOwnedPalette['50'],
    accentSoft: registryOwnedPalette['10'],
    accentDeep: registryOwnedPalette['100']
  }
} satisfies Record<BrandName, DemoBrand>

variables.defaultValue:
{
  'registry-default': {
    fontFamily: '"Sora", Inter, Arial, sans-serif',
    radius: 22,
    paddingInline: 22,
    paddingBlock: 10,
    bgDefault: '#FF5BAA',
    fgDefault: '#FFF4FB',
    bgHover: '#E3388A',
    fgHover: '#FFF4FB',
    bgActive: '#FFD7EA',
    fgActive: '#660739'
  },
  editorial: {
    fontFamily: 'Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif',
    radius: 6,
    paddingInline: 20,
    paddingBlock: 8,
    bgDefault: '#100B53',
    fgDefault: '#F6F2FF',
    bgHover: '#5147DB',
    fgHover: '#F6F2FF',
    bgActive: '#CECBFF',
    fgActive: '#100B53'
  },
  brutalist: {
    fontFamily: '"Courier New", monospace',
    radius: 0,
    paddingInline: 16,
    paddingBlock: 12,
    bgDefault: '#0E610E',
    fgDefault: '#F3FFF3',
    bgHover: '#4DC74D',
    fgHover: '#F3FFF3',
    bgActive: '#DAFFDA',
    fgActive: '#0E610E'
  }
} satisfies Record<OwnedPresetName, OwnedBrandRecipe>
